description: The episode opens with Lincoln pursued by authorities as ATCU agents escalate a city-wide manhunt for him. Banks gives orders to use lethal force if necessary, and Lincoln narrowly escapes a team closing in on him. The intensity is high as Lincoln realizes just how widespread the hunt for him has become.

transcript.line: He's moving north! Use lethal force if necessary!
Hurry up! Let's go! Down this trail! Move it! Move it!
Stop! Fall back! Unit two can try and head him off. But get her on the phone. Tell her we lost him. It's time to bring everyone else in on this.
